reference: Hello, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. It is true that swelling of the surrounding tissue occurs often after brain surgery. This happens because of the blood under the skin around the wound and the trauma of the skin and subcutaneous tissue from the procedure. The problem often disappears after two to three weeks. I hope this answers your question.
text: Hello, I have gone through your question and understand your concerns. It is true that swelling of the surrounding tissue occurs often after brain surgery. This happens because of the blood under the skin around the wound and the trauma of the skin and subcutaneous tissue from the procedure. The problem often disappears after 2-3 weeks. I hope this answers your question.
